title: reseda gilgiana var. nogalensis
intro: Reseda gilgiana var. nogalensis, also known as Nogal Reseda, is a variety of the Reseda gilgiana plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic activities. Its health benefits include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
